sections.title: Lena's Kitchen
sections.subtitle: Fresh, homemade catering for events big and small

sections.body: We specialize in Southern comfort food made from scratch. Whether it's a backyard birthday, a corporate lunch, or a wedding reception, we bring the warmth of a home-cooked meal to your event. Based in Fort Worth, serving all of DFW. Minimum 15 guests.

sections.caption: Our signature family-style spread — brisket, sides, and all the fixings

sections.text: Lena catered our company picnic and every single person asked for the mac and cheese recipe. Incredible food, incredibly easy to work with.
